description_long: This is a women's wedge sandal featuring a light beige criss-cross upper made of smooth synthetic or leather material. The sandal has an open toe and open back design, with a contoured footbed that appears cushioned for comfort. The wedge heel is medium height and has a faux wood grain texture, with a white accent along the back edge. The outsole is slightly textured for grip, and the stitching along the upper and heel area is visible, adding a touch of detail. The overall style is casual yet elegant, suitable for urban summer wear.
description: A beige wedge sandal with criss-cross straps, open toe, and faux wood grain wedge heel with white accent. The design is casual and comfortable, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the criss-cross straps, wedge heel with wood grain texture, and white accent at the back.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open toe and overlapping straps, with the footbed visible inside.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same criss-cross strap design and wedge heel details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open back, heel contour, and white accent along the heel edge.
